title: Slightly Better Scaffolding
description: Make scaffolding always fall perfectly vertically from where they were placed
body:
Make scaffolding always fall perfectly vertically from where they were placed, no more scattering.

This mod does NOT make scaffolding extended from the side fall into the same pile, if you want that, i recommend [this](https://modrinth.com/mod/scaffolding-drops-nearby).
